overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Take in an aerial view of Ken Sargent House and the surrounding campus. From here you can see the full building layout, the main entrance, visitor parking, and the landscaped grounds that welcome patients and families. The house sits within walking distance of the Grande Prairie Regional Hospital, making it a convenient home away from home during treatment.

main-entrance.title: Main Entrance
main-entrance.description: Arrive at the ground-level main entrance of Ken Sargent House. Glass doors open directly into the reception lobby, with an accessible ramp and railings on the left side of the front stairs. Illuminated welcome signage helps visitors find their way, whether arriving during the day or in the evening.

popup.title: Parking Lot
popup.body:
Visitor parking at Ken Sargent House provides convenient, accessible spaces for families and guests arriving for short or extended stays. This naming opportunity will recognize partners who help keep welcome and comfort within easy reach from the moment guests arrive.

Naming details for the parking area will be announced soon. Contact the Foundation to register your interest.

reception.title: Reception
reception.description: Step into the reception lobby at Ken Sargent House — the first point of contact for guests and families. Check in at the welcome desk, take a seat in the comfortable lounge area, and get directions to the dining hall and other guest spaces. Our reception team is here to help everyone feel informed, supported, and at home.

popup.title: Reception Desk
popup.body:
The reception at Ken Sargent House offers a warm and welcoming atmosphere for all guests. As the first point of contact, our reception team is dedicated to providing excellent customer service, ensuring that every visitor feels comfortable and well-informed.

The reception area is designed with a blend of modern comfort and classic charm, featuring stylish seating, soft lighting, and a cozy ambiance. Whether you're checking in, seeking assistance, or just looking for information, our friendly staff is always ready to help.

popup.title: Donor Wall
popup.body:
The Donor Wall at Ken Sargent House honours the generosity of partners who help families feel at home during treatment. Each recognition on the wall celebrates a lasting commitment to compassionate care and community support.

Thank you to our naming partners whose gifts continue to make a difference for patients and families at Grande Prairie Regional Hospital.

popup.title: Guest Shelter
popup.body:
The Guest Shelter at Ken Sargent House offers a covered outdoor space where families can pause, gather, and take a breath before heading inside. It extends a sense of welcome from the parking area to the front doors — a quiet moment of shelter on the way in or out.

This naming opportunity is currently reserved. Contact the Foundation with questions about availability or other ways to support Ken Sargent House.
